entries.speaker: sable
lines: Don't react. Follow me. We have a problem.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Something's wrong with Cael. He's not sleeping. He's
barely eating. He spends every night in the vault with the
Pendulum. And when he does come out, he asks questions.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: What kind of questions?

entries.speaker: sable
lines: He asked Aldis about historical cases of grief being
"cured." That's not academic. He asked Maren's old notes about
the Pallor's previous offers — what it promised, what it wanted.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: He shouldn't have access to those notes.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: He doesn't. He broke the ward on your study. Aldis
found the breach but didn't report it — she thought it was a
research emergency.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: I tried to talk to him. He said he was fine. He said
it three times. People who are fine don't say it three times.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: I'll talk to him.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: It's worse than that. Renn heard something from her
contacts — the Compact is moving troops. Not border probes.
Organized columns, heading for Valdris.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: When?

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Soon. Maybe days.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: The Pendulum. If Cael is compromised, and the
Compact is moving—

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Then we have tonight. Everyone get to your positions.
Torren, the walls. Lira, the ley wards. Maren, the vault.
Sable — stay close to Cael. If he moves, I want to know.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: And if he doesn't listen?

entries.speaker: edren
lines: He hasn't been listening for weeks. Just... be there.
*The alliances are secured. The warning is given. Tomorrow,
everything breaks.*
